aiModelsTab.modelsIntro: Model used for each AI-assisted operation. Enter a model name (e.g. claude-haiku-4-5-20251001). Leave blank to reset to the default.
aiModelsTab.dictNotEditable: (configured as full vendor/model form — edit in the config YAML)
aiModelsTab.nlIntro: Requests per minute per role for NL-to-SQL. Leave empty for unlimited.
aiModelsTab.vectorIntro: Registered embedding models available for semantic search. The registry is an allowlist.
aiModelsTab.savedRestartRequired: Saved. Restart the service to apply.
